title: Juniper vSRX OSPF Lab
description: A homelab project provisioning and automating a multi-router Juniper vSRX OSPF network on Proxmox. Infrastructure provisioning handled by Terraform, with Ansible managing router configuration through NETCONF, Jinja2 templates and Vault for secrets management.

title: xutility
description: A personal utility web app built to practice full-stack development and solve real day-to-day problems. Includes a project randomizer, movie watchlist tracker and a LeetCode spaced-repetition tracker in progress. Designed mobile-first, with more utilities added as new problems come up.

title: Network Topology Discovery & Visualization
description: A network automation tool that SSHes into Juniper vSRX routers, enables and queries LLDP to collect live neighbor information and renders the discovered topology as a visual graph with interface numbers and IP addresses.
